fomod.Name: Marth Requiem Overhaul
fomod.Author: Marth
fomod.Description:
A terminal load-order mod that rebalances Requiem's elemental mechanics, defense scaling, and late-game power curve.
Core features: - Elemental resistance cap removed; resistances above 100% absorb spell and enchantment damage as healing (1% per point, full absorb at 200%) - Physical DR scales past the 75% armor cap for the player and followers only, reaching 99% at ~2000 armor rating; the curve below 750 armor is unchanged - 13-skill Mastery system: unlocks at base skill 100, advances through usage. Combat skills up to +50% damage, armor skills up to +300 armor rating, magic schools up to +50 effective skill, crafting up to +25% - Boss Readiness MCM: threat assessment for Alduin Phase 1 and Final, Harkon, and Miraak; thresholds auto-adjust when World Eater's Influence or Immersive Miraak Difficulty are detected - Live Feature Toggles MCM: resistance cap, armor DR scaling, absorb, carry weight, arrow recovery, cell reset - Vendor gold doubled from load-order values - 3-day cell reset (from Requiem's 30-day default) for reliable restocking - First-run intro explains all changes; full customization via MCM - Optional Experience.ini: same total speed as Faster Leveling, weighted toward kills and quest completion over pure exploration - Requires: SKSE64, SkyUI 5.2+ (MCM), Custom Skills Framework (Mastery), powerofthree's Papyrus Extender - Compatible with: Experience.esp (XP rates), World Eater's Influence, Immersive Miraak Difficulty
